<x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::layout> <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::section-container class="px-6 py-0 sm:py-0"> <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::topbar :title="$exception->title()" :markdown="$exceptionAsMarkdown" /> </x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::section-container> <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::separator /> <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::section-container class="flex flex-col gap-8 py-0 sm:py-0"> <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::header :$exception /> </x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::section-container> <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::separator class="-mt-5 -z-10" /> <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::section-container class="flex flex-col gap-8 pt-14"> <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::trace :$exception /> <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::query :queries="$exception->applicationQueries()" /> </x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::section-container> <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::separator /> <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::section-container class="flex flex-col gap-12"> <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::request-header :headers="$exception->requestHeaders()" /> <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::request-body :body="$exception->requestBody()" /> <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::routing :routing="$exception->applicationRouteContext()" /> <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::routing-parameter :routeParameters="$exception->applicationRouteParametersContext()" /> </x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::section-container> <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::separator /> <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::section-container class="pb-0 sm:pb-0"> <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::laravel-ascii-spotlight /> </x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::section-container> </x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::layout>
